title: Report Document
description: Typed JSON document for LLM-authored reports. Generated from manifest.json for Go validators, JS dispatch metadata, and downstream type bindings.

aside.usage: 侧边/插入说明，可嵌套 sections

code.usage: 代码块，带 lang 字段

columns.usage: N 列并排（最多 4 列）

diagram.usage: 结构化图形,kind=flow|sequence|quadrant|tree|state|er。AI 填字段，渲染器生成自绘 SVG。

image.usage: 图片，src 必须 https:// 或 data: URI

input.usage: UI 控件（绑定到 cells.<name> input cell）

list.usage: 项目符号 / 编号列表，items 可嵌套

paragraph.usage: 散文段落，body 支持 inline markdown

stat.usage: KPI 单值卡，value 可绑定到 cell

x-presentation-notes.diagram_structure_only: `diagram` is structured JSON, not raw diagram DSL. Pick `kind: flow|sequence|quadrant|tree|state|er` and fill the typed fields; unsupported diagram grammars are intentionally unsupported until added as first-class schema.
x-presentation-notes.image_src_constraint: `image.src` must be `https://…` or `data:…` URI. Local paths (`file://`, `/var/...`, etc.) break the single-file deliverable promise — the rendered HTML must remain self-contained even after being moved or shared.
x-presentation-notes.markdown_in_text_fields: Inline markdown (bold, italic, links) is supported in: `paragraph.text`, `callout.text`, `quote.text`, `list` items, `table` cells, `definition.def`, `faq.a`. Block-level markdown (headings, lists) inside these fields is NOT supported — use the dedicated surface for those.
x-presentation-notes.additional_properties_rejected: Every section schema is `additionalProperties: false`. Adding fields not declared in `$defs/section.<type>` fails validation. Don't try to smuggle metadata via undeclared keys; if a field is missing, file a real schema change.
x-presentation-notes.section_if_visibility: Any section may include `if`: a boolean literal or `{"$bind":"cell"}`. When false, HTML hides the section; Markdown skips it. The bound cell must be declared in `cells`.

items.a: 冷启动从秒级降到毫秒级。

examples.text: **Cloudflare** 成立于 2009 年，总部位于旧金山。
Premature optimization is the root of all evil.

initial.description: id of the starting state — emits `[*] --> id`

final.description: ids of terminal states — each emits `id --> [*]`
